title: Contact — Scottish National Party

h3: Follow us on social media

Talk to parliamentarians Read our latest policy information Situated just off the Royal Mile in Edinburgh, SNP Headquarters is the administrative centre for the party. HQ staff include a dedicated Member Care team to provide support to members. Scottish National Party Gordon Lamb House 3 Jackson's Entry Edinburgh, Scotland EH8 8PJ email: info@snp.org Opening hours: Headquarters Mon-Fri 9am-5pm Call us: General: 0800 633 5432 Member Services: 0131 525 8925 --> SNP Press Officers can help journalists and press with interview requests and provide background to stories and campaigns.
